course_title: American Sign Language (ASL) for Beginners I
description:
Offered: every semester
This course introduces American Sign Language (ASL), a method of visual communication used by deaf people in the United States and Canada. Students learn visual readiness skills to recognize and express spatial relationships and to use appropriate non-manual signals, such as facial expressions and body movements. Cultural dynamics of the deaf/Deaf community are addressed.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): WS
